## PR Title Format

`<type>(<scope>): <short imperative summary>`

Examples:

- `feat(auth): add protected dashboard route`
- `fix(api): return 400 for invalid payloads`
- `docs(readme): clarify local setup steps`

## Why

- What problem is solved?
- Why is this the right approach?

## What Changed

- List the key changes in plain language.
- Keep this section focused on behavior and impact.

## Test Plan

- [ ] `yarn lint`
- [ ] `yarn typecheck`
- [ ] `yarn test`
- [ ] (If UI changed) add screenshots/video

## Issue

Closes #
